items.quote: Thank you for making such a unique film! Would love to shoot some in the mountains of BC and capture some one of a kind views. I'm half Ukrainian as well so that just makes it all the better.
items.author: Канада / Canada (CA)

items.quote: Keep up the good work for the cause of oild world film photography and the good people of Ukraine! We love and support you always.
items.author: США / United States (US)

items.quote:
I’m currently taking photos of historical re-enactments (WWII, WWI, the 19th century, etc.) and I’d love to try this film, as modern films are quite far away from the period aesthetic I usually photograph.
Regards from Spain!
items.author: Іспанія / Spain (ES)

items.quote: Keep up the good work it’s an amazing work you are doing.
items.author: Норвегія / Norway (NO)

items.quote: Fantastic work, I'd love to support you!
items.author: Велика Британія / United Kingdom (GB)

items.quote: I really like what you are doing and I'd be honoured to shoot your film!
items.author: Швеція / Sweden (SE)

items.quote: Love to buy some film and support the Ukranian forces. Just got at Kiev88 serviced at Arax so this would be the perfect film for that camera!
items.author: Норвегія / Norway (NO)

items.quote: Thank you for all of your efforts to make your film from scratch! Wow! I am interested in trying out a few rolls -- don't want to overwhelm you! 120, 620 and 127 would be awesome! Just let me know the details -- thanks!
items.author: США / United States (US)
